findings.description: This single rule bundles three distinct requirements from u_0002: (1) exact attribution format `- [Name], LISRAYA patient`, (2) italic/distinguished styling, and (3) pairing with warm lifestyle imagery. The imagery-pairing requirement is a layout/assembly concern, not copy_editorial, and is being absorbed into an editorial-style rule, obscuring its distinct scope and class.

Source unit cites a specific governance reference (§1.2) tying the footnote-marker requirement to an external compliance section, but the clustered rule carries no citation/governance facet capturing this traceable source reference.

Rule correctly captures the must_not/hard_constraint prohibition on reproducing locked elements in sections, but does not capture the positive companion requirement implicit in u_0003 that these elements must live in the locked header/footer — a distinct 'must' placement rule is missing, leaving only the negative half of the relation modeled.

payload.description: Priovant logo, copyright line, ® legal line, job code, Indication, and ISI must reside within locked header/footer components.
payload.name: locked_header_footer_elements_required_placement
